summary: Live PR inventory shard classified conservatively from hydrated preflight. No GitHub mutations are planned: instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise_pr paths are disabled for this job, and all five PRs are open useful work or maintainer/product-review gated rather than boringly closable.

actions.reason: Maintainer-owned draft PR with a useful focused fix and explicit maintainer-review gate; automation cannot merge, fix, raise a PR, or close it in this job.
Broad maintainer/migration PR with dirty merge state and proof/product-review gates; classification requires maintainer judgment, while this job cannot fix or merge.
Focused bug-fix PR with failed real-behavior proof and possible overlap with a broader active PR; human technical judgment is required and no close/fix path is allowed.
Stacked feature/fix PR depends on open #90975 and has a failed latest proof gate; maintainer/product judgment is required, and the job cannot merge, fix, or close it.
Useful but product-sensitive cron/tool-failure contract PR with missing real behavior proof and linked open product decision; human review is required and no close/fix path is allowed.

needs_human: #90219: maintainer-owned draft focused fix needs maintainer review before any merge or closure decision.
#90438: broad SQLite/session migration PR is dirty, draft, and proof/product-review gated.
#90690: Android-only focused fix has failed real-behavior proof and possible overlap with broader active #91049; technical correctness judgment is required.
#91474: stacked Antigravity reseed PR depends on open #90975 and has a failed latest proof gate.
#91493: cron fail-on-tool-failure contract needs real behavior proof and maintainer/product judgment against linked #85914.
